prompt: Make an app that showcases the model's intellect as a willed being — voice, live deliberation, and on-device language processing.
verified_capabilities: live softmax over twelve routes rendered as a radial dial
leave-one-word-out attribution over the real int8 weights
abstention rendered as refusal, naming recognized keywords
bigram-Markov reverie routed live (autonomous generation from own vocabulary)
voice input via Web Speech API SpeechRecognition
deterministic language processing: extractive summary, option and time extraction, clause decomposition
offline; no network calls after load
truth_boundary: Routing plus deterministic language processing only. Not a large language model, not text generation beyond recombining its own vocabulary, and not admitted.
